note:
Are the bears even trying? Seriously, you gotta be kidding me—140 HOT tickers lighting up the board this morning, and it’s not just scattershot. The scorecards are screaming risk-on across financials, energy, uranium, and even a sneaky little pocket of industrial metals. The market is telling us something. Are we listening? It’s pure demand out there, folks. Full stop.

Look, when 140 stocks are scoring ≥90 daily squeezes out of a universe of 356, that’s not a blip—it’s a statement. Almost 40% of the names we track are ready to blow; that’s leadership. The question isn’t whether the money is flowing. It’s where the money is flowing. Financials are on a heater with names like $KRE, $JPM, and $BAC all pressing HOT scores in bullish regimes. Even more impressive, uranium plays like $UEC and $CCJ are coiling tightly, ready to snap higher. And don’t overlook materials—$XLB at 98 daily with a solid neutral uptrend? Come on. These setups are straight-up cheat codes.

We’ve got a theme here: reflation nation, baby. Look at $KRE and $JPM, both riding bullish regimes with squeeze scores north of 98 on the daily and 93+ on the weekly. That’s not just strong—it’s persistent. Pair that with a comeback in uranium ($UEC, $CCJ) and industrials creeping back into the fold ($XLI, $BP), and you’ve got the makings of a macro rotation back into hard assets and cyclicals. We’re leaning into it. The banks are your playbook today. Got $JPM? If not, it’s time to look for a pullback entry.

On the portfolio front, here’s the deal: $CIFR, $RIOT, and $UAMY are all *still* on fire in this market. We’ve already taken 2x gains on 50% of those positions, but the squeeze metrics say there’s more juice to squeeze. For $CIFR and $RIOT, these crypto/data center names are as hot as it gets. If you’re not in yet, you’re late... but maybe not too late. Watch for pullbacks to jump in or scale into the second half of those we've already resized. Same goes for $UAMY—rare earths in a bullish regime with a 91 squeeze? That’s a gift. Meanwhile, we’re keeping a close eye on $BMNR, which has quietly crawled into HOT status. If there’s a catalyst here, it could be off to the races.

Today, watch for continuation in those bank names and confirmation from $UEC and $CCJ in the nuclear space. If $XLI gets back above pivot highs, we’re all systems go on the industrial sector. Markets are waking up to a reinflation trade—and the biggest question isn’t *if* you’re playing the squeeze, it’s *how hard* you’re pressing. Time to find out what you’re made of.
